overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district. The player character walks past deceased NPCs, futuristic vehicles, and bustling street vendors while exploring the urban environment with heavy neon lighting in pink, blue, and green hues.

agents.ego_description: walking forward on red pavement past deceased individuals while observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: deceased individuals lying motionless on the wet pavement
pedestrian walking away down the street

entered.detail: large black futuristic armored vehicle parked on the street with tinted windows
tall digital advertisements displaying bright pink and cyan neon graphics
distinctive red tiled pedestrian walkway with wet reflective surface
high-rise structures with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked city street at night, with the camera moving forward past several deceased individuals lying on red tiled pavement. A large black armored truck is parked on the right, while towering buildings with bright neon billboards rise in the background. The wet surfaces reflect the vibrant pink and cyan lighting characteristic of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved city sidewalk with safety railings

events.description: camera turns left to follow the curved street path along the railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved sidewalk next to a metal railing, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a glowing purple umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: black metal safety railing running along the edge of the curved sidewalk
digital traffic sign displaying speed limit of 40 in illuminated text

segments.scene_description: The camera curves left along a wet sidewalk bordered by a black metal railing, passing pedestrians carrying illuminated umbrellas. A digital speed limit sign displaying '40' becomes visible on the left. The opposing pedestrian flow creates a dynamic street atmosphere as the camera continues along the curved path away from the initial incident site.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza under overpass with parked vehicles

events.description: exits main street into open plaza area beneath large overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and entering the plaza area, navigating around parked vehicles

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal overpass spanning across the plaza with support pillars
several futuristic vehicles parked in the open lot including a black sedan
building facade illuminated with bright cyan and blue neon strip lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed street to a wide-open plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass. The camera crosses the asphalt surface, passing parked futuristic vehicles while cyan and blue neon lights illuminate a building on the right. The space opens up to reveal more of the towering city architecture above.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with food vendors and outdoor seating

events.description: camera pans around to view food stalls and surrounding neon signage

agents.ego_description: exploring the plaza area, observing street food vendors and the surrounding neon-lit architecture

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind counter serving customers at illuminated stall

entered.detail: circular building structure with bright pink and red neon trim and glowing windows
street food vendors with traditional red paper lanterns and bright green neon lighting
metal tables and chairs arranged outside the food stalls for customers

segments.scene_description: The camera explores a vibrant commercial plaza featuring a distinctive circular building with pink neon trim on the left. On the right, food stalls with traditional red paper lanterns and green neon lighting serve customers at outdoor seating areas. The scene is moderately populated with pedestrians browsing the vendor offerings while the wet pavement reflects the colorful lighting.

events.description: begins ascending wide concrete stairs to upper pedestrian level

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs to an elevated walkway while observing the surrounding architecture

entered.detail: wide concrete steps with yellow safety markings leading to upper level
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings with metal support structure
modern multi-story building with curved glass facade and illuminated interior windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera ascending wide concrete stairs to an elevated pedestrian level, moving into a more sheltered environment under an overhead walkway. A modern curved glass building rises on the left, while the upper level reveals additional digital billboards and architectural details of the cyberpunk cityscape. The transition to the elevated position provides a new perspective on the dense urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked downtown district that evolves from a grim crime scene into a vibrant, elevated commercial hub. It begins by moving past deceased individuals on red tiled pavement beside a black armored truck, where wet surfaces reflect the stark pink and cyan glow of towering neon billboards. As the camera curves left along a sidewalk bordered by metal railings and pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas, the scene opens from the enclosed street into a wide plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass. The movement then shifts toward a bustling commercial area featuring a circular building with pink trim and food stalls adorned with red lanterns and green neon, before finally ascending wide concrete stairs to an elevated pedestrian level. This ascent leads the camera under an overhead walkway toward a curved glass building, providing a sheltered, high-angle perspective of the dense cyberpunk architecture.
